name: cloudbox-backend
description: KloudBox MID/UTS backend with Express, Prisma, JWT, and Xendit invoices.

scripts.lint: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/routes/authRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/boxRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/orderRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/packageRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/xenditRoutes.js && node --check src/services/dockerService.js && node --check src/services/provisioningService.js && node --check src/services/xenditService.js && node --check scripts/check-xendit-invoice.js && node --check scripts/ensure-sqlite-db.js
